content.en:
"Like the Primordial Star?"

Ye Tian remembered this special multi-dimensional star.

"Not bad. The Purple Yun Realm Lord nodded slightly, "The Primal Star is a very special multi-dimensional star, far from being comparable to the Fog-Eyed Star, the Ninth Realm can't get close to the Primal Star, but it also causes the Eighth Realm to almost be unable to take the Primal Star as their natal star and absorb the energy of the Primal Star to break through." The Primordial Domain Body is not good, even if the Primordial Domain Body is in the Perfection Realm, the Primordial Star Breath absorbed is too weak, and it is far from reaching the standard of breakthrough. "

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, there is no way to break through on your own, isn't there an example?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Perhaps, but I haven't seen it, and I don't know. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

The previous Purple Yun Realm Lord was only an Eighth Realm, how could he know too many secrets!

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, anyway, he was still far from impacting the ninth realm, his current goal was to comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, and then break through to the eighth realm.

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, if you want to attack the Ninth Realm in the future, I can help you find a suitable multi-dimensional astral body. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

She felt that she had no choice but to do anything about the Ten Pyloric Sects, but Ye Tian was very rebellious and might be able to surpass the Lord of the Hidden Realm, so investing in Ye Tian and putting hope on Ye Tian was also a choice.

This is also the reason why she told Ye Tian about the Pearl of the Ruins.

"Thank you Purple Yun Realm Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

He also knew that if he couldn't break through to the ninth realm in the future, he would have to use multi-dimensional astral bodies, and he would definitely have to break through in the way the Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

Subsequently.

He was separated from the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

The Purple Yun Realm mainly goes to retreat and practice to increase strength, and it will not appear in a short period of time.

And the same is true for Ye Tian, he wants to focus all his energy on comprehending the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, and strive to comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions as soon as possible.

......

The years that followed.

Ye Tian continued to use the primordial advent to comprehend the dimensional rules, with the domain body secret technique multi-dimensional wisdom light and the top-dimensional Tongbao Xuanlin Mirror, Ye Tian quickly comprehended the dimensional rules.

Time flies.

Before you know it, three thousand domain yuan years have passed.

Ye Tian has been honestly comprehending the dimensional rules during this time, although after reaching more than three hundred dimensional rules, it is very difficult to continue to comprehend the dimensional rules.

Fortunately, the Primal Star was powerful enough, so that after Ye Tian continued to comprehend, he finally comprehended the rules of the three hundred and sixty-fifth dimension on this day.

After comprehending the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, he finally sensed the existence of the multi-dimensional shackles in his body.

Only by breaking this shackle can you truly impact the eighth realm.

This layer of multi-dimensional shackles is very complicated, and it locks his realm from all aspects, except for the Taihao Golden Liquid, only the three hundred and sixty-five dimensional rules can break it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used the three hundred and sixty-five dimensional rules to constantly crush the multi-dimensional shackles in his body, but this layer of multi-dimensional shackles was too huge, covering the whole body, and it would take a long time to completely shatter it.

Before I knew it, another hundred years had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tiancai broke 10% of the multi-dimensional shackles, which means that it would take him a thousand domain yuan years to break all the multi-dimensional shackles.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, he silently impacted the multi-dimensional shackles.

The multi-dimensional shackles were shattered little by little, and Ye Tian already felt the signs that the peace was about to break through, but before the multi-dimensional shackles were completely broken, it was impossible for him to break through to the eighth realm.

In this way, another nine hundred domain yuan time passed.

Click!!!!

Finally, the multidimensional shackles were broken.

At this moment, the shackles that prevented Ye Tian from breaking through to the eighth realm no longer existed, and he could break through to the eighth realm at any time.

However, before impacting the Eighth Realm, he first cultivated both the Primal Domain Body and the Phantom Domain Body to the Perfection Realm.

After a period of time, these two dimensional domains all broke through to the realm of perfection, and the strength of the physical body skyrocketed.

Then, he began to attack the Eighth Realm.

The impact on the eighth realm is very moving, and the energy on the side of the 4000th realm is limited, which is not suitable for breaking through.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian had come to the thirteenth dimension, and he had already found a suitable location to break through.

Yuanxu Sea.

Ye Tian descended here, and there were originally many multi-dimensional beings of the Seventh Realm here, but they were all killed or driven away by him.

And he also built a formation here and transformed it into a dojo, which was suitable for him to break through the eighth realm.

In addition, there is an abundance of energy here, and there will be no lack of energy.

And several of his replica bodies patrol the vicinity to prevent multidimensional life from disrupting his breakthrough process.

"Here we go~!"

Ye Tian thought of the eighth realm.

Rumble!!!!

The dimensional domains in the body began to transform, from the thirty-six-fold dimensional domains to the three hundred and sixty-five-fold dimensional domains, all of which were very perfect dimensional domains, and there was no problem at all.

And his physical body began to transform, his soul will transformed, and his extradimensional power was also transformed.

From the outside world, countless energies poured into his body, helping him quickly complete the breakthrough.

As time passed, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and his strength became stronger and stronger.

I don't know how long it has been.

Finally.

Ye Tian completely broke through to the eighth realm.

And he also found that he had changed a lot, breaking through to the eighth realm with the rule of three hundred and sixty-five dimensions, which seemed to have changed a lot more than the eighth realm that he broke through with Taihao Golden Liquid.

First of all, his soul will directly broke through to the peak realm of the fifteenth dimension, his physical fitness was stronger, and the dimensional domain was more perfect.

And he gave birth to a new kind of domain body, which is not an ordinary domain body (Wang Li Zhao), it seems to be above the normal domain body.

Ye Tian closed his eyes, and there seemed to be three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional star apertures in his body, and these multi-dimensional star apertures echoed the multi-dimensional star bodies located in the sixteenth to eighteenth dimensions.

He could absorb the power of these multi-dimensional astral bodies to strengthen his multi-dimensional astral aperture, and to strengthen his new dimensional domain body.

And this kind of change, the Purple Yun Realm Lord didn't say it, maybe the Purple Yun Realm Lord didn't know about this change, after all, she didn't break through with the three hundred and sixty-five dimensional rules.

This should not be regarded as a dimensional domain body, it should be called a supreme dimensional domain body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to absorb the breath energy of those multi-dimensional astral bodies to strengthen his own supreme dimensional domain body.

With each passing moment, his physical fitness is improving.

In comparison, those so-called dimensional domains are too spicy.
